questions.question: Describe the difference between supervised and unsupervised deep learning. Provide an example to illustrate this difference.
questions.hint: Explain the main purpose of each type and a common use case.

questions.question: What is the purpose of regularization techniques in deep learning? Provide an example of a regularization technique used in a neural network.
questions.hint: Explain the effect of regularization on model performance and provide a common implementation.

questions.question: How does batch normalization affect the training process of a deep neural network? Provide an example of how batch normalization can improve model performance.
questions.hint: Explain the role of batch normalization in stabilizing the training process and improving model accuracy.
